settings.heading: What is Villa Bodrum?
settings.row_content: Villa Bodrum is a curated home decor and gifting destination offering elegant and affordable pieces that bring warmth and sophistication to any space.

settings.heading: Where are your products sourced from?
settings.row_content: We work with a variety of trusted suppliers to bring you high-quality home decor and gifting essentials from around the world.

settings.heading: Where do you ship to?
settings.row_content: We currently ship in the United States (continental U.S. only at this time). If you’re outside U.S., please contact us, and we’ll do our best to accommodate.

settings.heading: How long does shipping take?
settings.row_content: Shipping times vary depending on the product and destination. Most orders are processed within 2-4 business days and delivered within 5-8 business days. You can find estimated shipping times at checkout.

settings.heading: How can I track my order?
settings.row_content: Once your order has shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. You can track your order [insert tracking link if available].

settings.heading: What is your return policy?
settings.row_content: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery. Items must be unused, in original packaging, and in re-sellable condition. Some exclusions apply (such as final sale or personalized items).

settings.heading: How do I start a return?
settings.row_content: To initiate a return, please visit our [Returns & Exchanges] page or contact our customer service team at info@villa-bodrum.com

settings.heading: Do you offer exchanges?
settings.row_content: At this time, we do not offer direct exchanges. Please return your item and place a new order.

settings.heading: How do I care for my home decor items?
settings.row_content: Each product comes with care instructions. For general cleaning tips, use a soft cloth and avoid harsh chemicals unless otherwise stated.

settings.heading: Are your candles and diffusers made with natural ingredients?
settings.row_content: Yes! Our candles and diffusers are made with high-quality, non-toxic ingredients for a clean and long-lasting fragrance experience.

settings.heading: Can I include a personalized note with my gift?
settings.row_content: Absolutely! You can add a personalized note at checkout, and we’ll include it with your gift packaging.

settings.heading: Do you offer gift wrapping?
settings.row_content: Yes! We offer beautifully curated gift packaging to make your gifts extra special. Simply select the gift-wrapping option at checkout.

settings.text: Can’t find what you’re looking for? We’re committed to making your journey effortless—reach out to us anytime!
